leadText: Secret Meadow (Japanese: ひみつの花畑 Secret Meadow) is a location in Hoenn with many Secret Spots where Secret Bases can be made. Other than Flying and soaring, it can only be accessed by surfacing from the northwestern Dive spot in the underwater area on Route 130.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] The Secret Meadow is a small meadow of grass and flowers surrounded by cliffs, through which climb several sets of stairs. There are six different Secret Spots around the Secret Meadow. Flying or soaring to this location, the player will land several tiles in front of the central staircase. There are no Trainers , wild Pokémon , or items here.
